Demurrer To Amended Answer; Memorandum Of P/A In Support
Off Calendar Apr-22-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Clifford E. Fried, Esq. of WIEGEL & FRIED, LLP 552-8230 for Plaintiff EDWARD TOPHAM demurring to the Amended Answer
Daniel Berko, Esq. 621-4500 for defendants RICHARD PERRILLO and KEITH WHITEMAN opposing party

Argued and the Court ruled as follows:
1st Affirmative Defense -- overruled
Affirmative Defenses 3b and 3d -- sustained with leave to amend.
Affirmative Defense 3g -- sustained without leave to amend.
Affirmative Defense 3i -- sustained without leave to amend
Unclean Hands Defense -- sustained without leave to amend.
Mr. Berko is to file his amendment today.

Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193

DEMURRER TO AMENDED ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-16-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Clifford Edward Fried, Esq. of WEIGEL AND FRIED 552-8230 for Plaintiff EDWARD TOPHAM demurring to the First Amended Answer
Daniel Berko, Esq. 621-4500 for defendants RICHARD PERRILLO and KEITH WHITEMAN opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- demurrer to the Amended Answer is sustained with 1 day leave to file a Second Amended Answer. Mr. Fried may set his demurrer to the Second Amended Answer for hearing for Monday, April 22, 2002. His papers are to be filed by Wednesday. Opposition to be filed by Friday, April 19th by noon.
(JJM) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
